description: For tasks that ask an agent to identify a problem and recommend a remediation plan. Used across paid-media, engineering, finance, and similar diagnosis-heavy domains.

dimensions.name: specificity
dimensions.description: Concrete numbers, named tactics, named tools — not generic advice. A specific recommendation names platforms, timeframes, or thresholds.

dimensions.name: correctness
dimensions.description: Technically sound given the scenario, no fabricated claims, no recommendations that would be counterproductive in the described context.

dimensions.name: actionability
dimensions.description: Could a practitioner execute this without further clarification? Each recommendation should be a concrete next step, not a direction.

dimensions.name: domain_signal
dimensions.description: Uses real domain-specific framing, terminology, and reasoning correctly — not surface-level keyword insertion. The scorer should not be able to mistake this for a generic output.

_note: comparison_required: true means the harness MUST run baseline condition alongside persona condition. A rubric without this field is malformed.
